TypeSignature.Value: public abstract class TypeInfo : Type, System.Reflection.IReflectableType
.class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit TypeInfo extends System.Type implements class System.Reflection.IReflectableType
Public MustInherit Class TypeInfo Inherits Type Implements IReflectableType
type TypeInfo = class inherit Type interface IReflectableType
public ref class TypeInfo abstract : Type, System::Reflection::IReflectableType

Docs.summary: Represents type declarations for class types, interface types, array types, value types, enumeration types, type parameters, generic type definitions, and open or closed constructed generic types.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
<xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> contains many of the members available in the <xref:System.Type> class. To get a <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> object from a <xref:System.Type> object, use the <xref:System.Reflection.IntrospectionExtensions.GetTypeInfo(System.Type)?displayProperty=nameWithType> extension method.
A <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> object represents the type definition itself, whereas a <xref:System.Type> object represents a reference to the type definition. Getting a <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> object forces the assembly that contains that type to load. In comparison, you can manipulate <xref:System.Type> objects without necessarily requiring the runtime to load the assembly they reference.
You can use the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredMembers> property to get all declared members, or the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredProperties> property to get all declared properties. Reflection contexts can implement lazy traversal of these collections for large assemblies or types. To get specific members, use methods such as <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.GetDeclaredMethod*> and <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.GetDeclaredProperty*>, and pass the name of the method or property you would like to retrieve.
To filter the results of <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> properties, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.
## Examples
The following example uses the reflection types and members in .NET to retrieve the methods and properties of the <xref:System.Globalization.Calendar> type, including inherited methods and properties, and then writes them to the console.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection/TypeInfo/Overview/example.cs" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a instance.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Type AsType() cil managed
Public Overridable Function AsType () As Type
abstract member AsType : unit -> Type override this.AsType : unit -> Type

Docs.summary: Returns the current type as a object.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredConstructors As IEnumerable(Of ConstructorInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the constructors declared by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the constructors declared by the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredConstructors> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredEvents As IEnumerable(Of EventInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the events defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the events defined by the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredEvents> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredFields As IEnumerable(Of FieldInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the fields defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the fields defined by the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredFields> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredMembers As IEnumerable(Of MemberInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the members defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the members defined by the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredMembers> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredMethods As IEnumerable(Of MethodInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the methods defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the methods defined by the current type.

remarks.format:
## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredMethods> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.
## Examples
The following example uses the reflection types and members in .NET to retrieve the methods and properties of the <xref:System.Globalization.Calendar> type, including inherited methods and properties, and then writes them to the console.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection/TypeInfo/Overview/example.cs" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredNestedTypes As IEnumerable(Of TypeInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the nested types defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of nested types defined by the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks To filter the results of the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo.DeclaredNestedTypes> property, use LINQ queries. For reflection objects that originate with the runtime (for example, as the result of `typeof(Object)`), you can traverse the inheritance tree by using the methods in the <xref:System.Reflection.RuntimeReflectionExtensions> class. Consumers of objects from customized reflection contexts cannot use these methods and must traverse the inheritance tree themselves.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property DeclaredProperties As IEnumerable(Of PropertyInfo)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the properties defined by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the properties defined by the current type.

remarks.format:
## Examples
The following example uses the reflection types and members in .NET to retrieve the methods and properties of the <xref:System.Globalization.Calendar> type, including inherited methods and properties, and then writes them to the console.
:::code language="csharp" source="~/snippets/csharp/System.Reflection/TypeInfo/Overview/example.cs" id="Snippet1":::

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property GenericTypeParameters As Type()
public: virtual property cli::array <Type ^> ^ GenericTypeParameters { cli::array <Type ^> ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets an array of the generic type parameters of the current instance.
Docs.value: An array that contains the current instance's generic type parameters, or an array of zero if the current instance has no generic type parameters.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Reflection.EventInfo GetDeclaredEvent(string name) cil managed
Public Overridable Function GetDeclaredEvent (name As String) As EventInfo
abstract member GetDeclaredEvent : string -> System.Reflection.EventInfo override this.GetDeclaredEvent : string -> System.Reflection.EventInfo

Docs.summary: Returns an object that represents the specified event declared by the current type.
Docs.returns: An object that represents the specified event, if found; otherwise, .

abstract member GetDeclaredMethod : string -> System.Reflection.MethodInfo override this.GetDeclaredMethod : string -> System.Reflection.MethodInfo

Docs.summary: Returns an object that represents the specified method declared by the current type.
Docs.returns: An object that represents the specified method, if found; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class System.Reflection.MethodInfo> GetDeclaredMethods(string name) cil managed
Public Overridable Function GetDeclaredMethods (name As String) As IEnumerable(Of MethodInfo)
abstract member GetDeclaredMethods : string -> seq<System.Reflection.MethodInfo> override this.GetDeclaredMethods : string -> seq<System.Reflection.MethodInfo>

Docs.param: The method name to search for.
Docs.summary: Returns a collection that contains all methods declared on the current type that match the specified name.
Docs.returns: A collection that contains methods that match .

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Reflection.TypeInfo GetDeclaredNestedType(string name) cil managed
Public Overridable Function GetDeclaredNestedType (name As String) As TypeInfo
abstract member GetDeclaredNestedType : string -> System.Reflection.TypeInfo override this.GetDeclaredNestedType : string -> System.Reflection.TypeInfo

Docs.param: The name of the nested type.
Docs.summary: Returns an object that represents the specified nested type declared by the current type.
Docs.returns: An object that represents the specified nested type, if found; otherwise, .

Docs.returns: An object that represents the specified property, if found; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overridable ReadOnly Property ImplementedInterfaces As IEnumerable(Of Type)

Docs.summary: Gets a collection of the interfaces implemented by the current type.
Docs.value: A collection of the interfaces implemented by the current type.

Docs.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether the specified type can be assigned to the current type.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance bool IsAssignableFrom(class System.Reflection.TypeInfo typeInfo) cil managed
Public Overridable Function IsAssignableFrom (typeInfo As TypeInfo) As Boolean

Docs.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether the specified type can be assigned to the current type.
Docs.returns: if the specified type can be assigned to this type; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: .method hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Reflection.TypeInfo System.Reflection.IReflectableType.GetTypeInfo() cil managed
Function GetTypeInfo () As TypeInfo Implements IReflectableType.GetTypeInfo
abstract member System.Reflection.IReflectableType.GetTypeInfo : unit -> System.Reflection.TypeInfo override this.System.Reflection.IReflectableType.GetTypeInfo : unit -> System.Reflection.TypeInfo

Docs.summary: Returns a representation of the current type as a object.
Docs.returns: A reference to the current type.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This member is an explicit interface member implementation. It can be used only when the <xref:System.Reflection.TypeInfo> instance is cast to an <xref:System.Reflection.IReflectableType> interface.
